RULING:
DEFENDANT LARRY YOUNG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- Counsel for plaintiff presented the proof of service to the Court. The Court overruled defendant's demurrer, 5 days leave to answer from notice of entry of order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/JLW/DM) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558.
